recommendations.title: Choke
recommendations.overview: A sex-addicted con-man pays for his mother's hospital bills by playing on the sympathies of those who rescue him from choking to death.

recommendations.title: Ice Road: Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Big rig ice road driver Mike McCann travels to Nepal to scatter his late brother’s ashes on Mt. Everest. While on a packed tour bus traversing the deadly 12,000 ft. terrain of the infamous Road to the Sky, McCann and his mountain guide encounter a gr

recommendations.title: Destiny
recommendations.overview: Bekir loves Uğur, who loves Zagor, who is about to get out of jail. An already tense love triangle is thrown into turmoil on a hot summer night, when Zagor kills someone, and Uğur disappears.

recommendations.title: Eye for an Eye
recommendations.overview: It's fire and brimstone time as grieving mother Karen McCann takes justice into her own hands when a kangaroo court in Los Angeles fails to convict Robert Doob, the monster who raped and murdered her 17-year-old daughter.

recommendations.title: I've Loved You So Long
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to interact with her family and find her place in society after spending fifteen years in prison.

recommendations.title: Bad Samaritan
recommendations.overview: A thief makes a disturbing discovery in the house where he breaks in. Later, when he returns to the same house with his partner in crime, things are no longer how he expected.

recommendations.title: A Letter to Momo
recommendations.overview: A shy 11-year-old's life takes a strange turn when she discovers three hungry goblins living in the attic of her new house. She misses her old life. She misses her father so very much. Until she makes some new ghoulish friends.

recommendations.title: Bhoothnath
recommendations.overview: Moving into a new house, a family witnesses an unfriendly ghost who wants to drive them away from the house. However, he befriends a little boy who changes his outlook forever.

recommendations.title: Blood and Black Lace

recommendations.title: Nowhere Special
recommendations.overview: John, a 35-year-old window cleaner, has dedicated his life to bringing up his 4-year-old son, Michael, after the child's mother left them soon after giving birth. When John is given only a few months left to live, he attempts to find a new, perfect f
